enunciado:
Given a string 
s
, return 
the 
lexicographically smallest
 
subsequence
 of
 
s
 
that contains all the distinct characters of
 
s
 
exactly once
.


 


Example 1:




Input:
 s = "bcabc"

Output:
 "abc"



Example 2:




Input:
 s = "cbacdcbc"

Output:
 "acdb"



 


Constraints:




1 <= s.length <= 1000


s
 consists of lowercase English letters.




 


Note:
 This question is the same as 316: 
https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-duplicate-letters/
